CONTENT.Honours: Club BruggeBelgian Pro League: 2019–20, 2020–21Belgian Super Cup: 2021
CONTENT.Club career: He made his professional debut in the Serie B for Spezia on 9 April 2016 in a game against Novara. In 2018–19 season, he scored 10 goals and 12 assists in 33 games.On 9 July 2019, he signed a four-year contract with Club Brugge.On 12 August 2021, Okereke joined newly promoted Serie A club Venezia on a season-long loan with an option to make the transfer permanent.On 28 July 2022, Okereke joined Cremonese, on a three-year contract for a reported fee of €10 million.On 1 February 2024, Okereke moved to Torino on loan with an option to buy.
CONTENT.Personal life: On 15 September 2020 he tested positive for COVID-19.

SUMMARY: David Chidozie Okereke (born 29 August 1997) is a Nigerian professional footballer who plays as a forward for Italian Serie A club Torino on loan from Cremonese.
